title: euryloma × leucantha
intro: Euryloma × leucantha, also known as 'Purple Fountain Beebalm', is a hybrid ornamental plant that is a cross between Lamiaceae family's Eurylophus and Lamiophlomis plants. The plant's leaves and flowers are used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Consuming Euryloma × leucantha or using its herbal preparations can offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and even aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Euryloma × leucantha can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be dried and used in herbal smoking blends or as a culinary herb.
